call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car down payment. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that fit within your budget? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, I think so. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. We can get the paperwork started right away if you'd like. 
Eleanor: Yeah, okay. Let's do it.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we acquired your information through a marketing partner. We're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and a lower APR after six months of responsible use. 
Robert: I don't need another credit card. And frankly, I'm not happy about being called. Take me off your list. 
Agent: I understand, sir. I apologize for the inconvenience. I'll make a note of your request. Have a good day.

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a Personal Loan. Your friend, Maria Rodriguez, referred you. 
Jessica: Oh, hey! Yeah, she mentioned you guys. I'm thinking about starting a small business, so I need some capital. 
Agent: That's fantastic! We can definitely help. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. This could be perfect for getting your business off the ground. 
Jessica: Okay, that sounds… good. What are the terms? 
Agent: The loan term is 60 months, with a fixed monthly payment of around $330. There's a $300 origination fee, and a late payment fee of $25. 
Jessica: $300? That's a bit steep, isn't it? 
Agent: It covers the administrative costs of processing the loan. We also offer a discount if you enroll in autopay. 
Jessica: Hmm. What about the APR? Is that 12.5% including fees? 
Agent: No, the APR is slightly higher, around 13.2%, factoring in the origination fee. 
Jessica: Okay. And what happens if I pay it off early? 
Agent: There's no prepayment penalty, so you can pay it off whenever you like without any extra charges. 
Jessica: Alright. Let me think about it overnight. Can you send me some information via email? 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll send you a detailed loan agreement and a breakdown of all the fees. My email is david.finance@email.com.

Agent: Good afternoon, Mr. Davis. This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Oh, yeah, I did. Just looking at my options. 
Agent: Great! We are pre-approving you for a $1,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 15.99%. It offers cash back rewards on all purchases. 
Michael: Cash back, huh? How much? 
Agent: 1.5% on all purchases, and 3% on dining and travel. 
Michael: That's not bad. What's the annual fee? 
Agent: There is no annual fee. 
Michael: Okay. And is there a balance transfer option? 
Agent: Yes, we offer balance transfers with a 3% fee. 
Michael: Hmm. Send me some more details, and I'll take a look. 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll email you the full terms and conditions right away.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Green? This is Kevin from Finance Solutions. We're offering a Personal Loan… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) You guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $2,000 Personal Loan at 24.99%... 
Patricia: (Shouting) I said NO! Do NOT call me again! (Click - Hangs up)
